text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 34 

BENE_SEX_CD 

LABEL: Sex of Beneficiary 

DESCRIPTION: The sex of the beneficiary 

SHORT NAME: SEX 

LONG NAME: BENE_SEX_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 0 = Unknown 
2 = Female 
1 = Male 

COMMENT: This field comes from the sex code that is present on the first claim record included in the stay. 

^ Back to TOC ^
